channel.title: World - Latest - Google News
channel.copyright: Copyright © 2026 Google. All rights reserved. This XML feed is made available solely for the purpose of rendering Google News results within a personal feed reader for personal, non-commercial use. Any other use of the feed is expressly prohibited. By accessing this feed or using these results in any manner whatsoever, you agree to be bound by the foregoing restrictions.

item.title: Neighbor Treats Guy’s Garden Like A Free Flower Farm, Gets A Starring Role On His Doorbell Camera - Bored Panda
item.description: Neighbor Treats Guy’s Garden Like A Free Flower Farm, Gets A Starring Role On His Doorbell Camera  Bored Panda

item.title: Douglas Murray: How a Gay Cruise Got Stuck Between Islam and the West - The Free Press
item.description:
1. Douglas Murray: How a Gay Cruise Got Stuck Between Islam and the West  The Free Press
  2. Twice-rejected American cruise puts spotlight on rollback of LGBTQ rights, passengers say  CNN
  3. Turkey barred a cruise with gay travelers before Egypt turned it away. The Trump admin stayed silent  Advocate.com
  4. LGBTQ+ cruise ship refused entry to Egypt days after Turkey turned it away  The Guardian
  5. Patti LuPone’s Gay Cruise Ship Blocked (Again) From Entering Egypt  The Hollywood Reporter

item.title: WATCH: Russian soldier thrown through air as Soviet-era helicopter gun spins out of control - Fox News
item.description:
1. WATCH: Russian soldier thrown through air as Soviet-era helicopter gun spins out of control  Fox News
  2. Russian soldiers in ‘close call’ as machinegun plan backfires  The Times
  3. Video of Russian Live-Fire Exercise Mishap Viewed Millions of Times  Newsweek
  4. Soldier flung as machine gun spins out of control in epic fail  Chronicle-Tribune
  5. Russian soldier sent flying as Soviet-era helicopter gun spins out of control  Yahoo
